name: Molho De Piri-Piri (Portuguese Hot Red Pepper Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 2 chili peppers, depending upon their hotness (up to 6)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stem the peppers and coarsely chop them, including the seeds.
2. Place the chopped peppers in a pint-sized shaker jar along with the salt, olive oil, and vinegar.
3. Cover tightly and shake well.
4. Store at room temperature. The sauce will keep for about a month.
5. Shake the sauce every time you use it.
Note: For a milder flavor, roast the peppers uncovered for 15 minutes at low oven heat (300°F), cool until easy to handle, then slip off the skins. Otherwise, prepare as directed.
